reviews.review_title: No longer works, no support available
reviews.review_description:
Now that Meta have taken over, they don't want people to continue using older products and have removed support for GearVR, bricking older devices.
Planned Obsolescence I guess.
Its good. Could be better.
I bought and paid for 3 3D movies which aren't chesp!!! Now I'm heading t.f ing I cant watch them noe!? Complete BS
I insert my phone with everything downloaded and put it in my oculus gear and then it says "Please insert your phone", and I did that but it just keeps saying "Please insert your phone".

I would have given this 5 stars but it's too personal. Who wants to sit in a big room alone. It should allow avators of friends. Make it more social. It's nice to hear your friends but much much better to see them. Tst tst.

So, I am new to the VR experience. Of course, I simply love it! And one of the things that I love, besides of course the movie-theater sized screen, are the 3d movies! Look, some people will win the lottery, and complain about having to pay taxes on the millions of dollars that they won. But here is the truth. One can not match the viewing experience you get from watching a 3d movie with an Oculus VR headset, Quest or Go,  on Oculus Videos with any TV currently sold. None. The viewing experience of 3d movies is utterly fantastic, nothing short of absolutely AMAZING!!! Also, please obtain ALL the 3d movies that you can,  3d movies will be happily rented at ANY reasonable price!! They-3d movies-are simply UNBELIEVABLE when viewed on this application!!!

I've been waiting for 3 days now for this to download. So I really can't leave a review because it won't even install for me to check out. Piece of crap.
Can anyone recommend another video instead of this??? Help!!!!
It is awesome

This is by far one of the coolest theater simulations I've seen on the VR. It could use some updating though... More simulations should be added. Not sure what happened to the simulation where it looked like you are viewing a phone screen in the grass... That was an awesome simulation and it should be put back. Other than that, I find this simulation very relaxing to watch movies as if I'm in a theater alone at peace. Thank you for this and keep up the good work.
